import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 512
        output_dim = 4
        
        # Attention-based pooling layers
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Modality-specific projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 4, output_dim)
        )
    
    def attention_pool(self, x, attn_layer):
        attn_scores = attn_layer(x)
        attn_weights = F.softmax(attn_scores, dim=1)
        return (x * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Attention-weighted pooling
        visual_pooled = self.attention_pool(visual, self.visual_attn)
        text_pooled = self.attention_pool(text, self.text_attn)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_embed = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_embed = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        # Concatenate and apply gating
        concat = torch.cat([visual_embed, text_embed], dim=-1)
        gated = concat * self.gate(concat)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(gated)
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling for each modality
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, 1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Low-rank bilinear fusion
        self.v_bilinear = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64, bias=False)
        self.t_bilinear = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64, bias=False)
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim + 64, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling for visual features
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(visual).softmax(dim=1)
        visual_pooled = (visual * v_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Attention pooling for text features
        t_attn = self.text_attn(text).softmax(dim=1)
        text_pooled = (text * t_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        t = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        gated = gate * v + (1 - gate) * t
        
        # Low-rank bilinear fusion
        v_b = self.v_bilinear(v)
        t_b = self.t_bilinear(t)
        bilinear = v_b * t_b
        
        # Combine gated and bilinear features
        fused = torch.cat([gated, bilinear], dim=-1)
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        return out

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Robust dimension extraction
        def get_dim(info, default):
            if isinstance(info, dict):
                if 'shape' in info:
                    d = info['shape'][-1]
                    return int(d) if isinstance(d, str) else d
                elif 'dim' in info:
                    d = info['dim']
                    return int(d) if isinstance(d, str) else d
                return default
            return int(info) if not isinstance(info, int) else info
        
        visual_dim = get_dim(input_dims.get('visual', 1024), 1024)
        text_dim = get_dim(input_dims.get('text', 768), 768)
        
        self.embed_dim = 64
        
        # Adaptive pooling
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, self.embed_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, self.embed_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Linear(self.embed_dim * 2, self.embed_dim)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.embed_dim, 32),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(32, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Pool over sequence dimension: [B, L, D] -> [B, D, L] -> [B, D, 1] -> [B, D]
        v = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)
        t = self.text_pool(text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)
        
        # Project
        v = self.visual_proj(v)
        t = self.text_proj(t)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(concat))
        fused = gate * v + (1 - gate) * t
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Use fixed dimensions from API contract to avoid dict parsing issues
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        hidden_dim = 512
        output_dim = 4
        
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Tanh(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 2, output_dim)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)
        text_pooled = text.mean(dim=1)
        
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        concat = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)
        gates = self.gate(concat)
        
        fused = gates[:, 0:1] * visual_feat + gates[:, 1:2] * text_feat
        
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

            text_dim = text_info[-1]

        # Project to common dimension
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.t_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Adaptive pooling for robustness
        # visual: B x 256 x 1024 -> B x 16 x 1024
        v_reduced = visual.reshape(B, 16, 16, -1).mean(dim=2)
        
        # text: B x 77 x 768 -> B x 10 x 768 (pad to 80, then reduce)
        t_padded = F.pad(text, (0, 0, 0, 3))
        t_reduced = t_padded.reshape(B, 10, 8, -1).mean(dim=2)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v_reduced)
        t = self.t_proj(t_reduced)
        
        # Layer norm
        v = self.v_norm(v)
        t = self.t_norm(t)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(t, v, v)
        t_attended = self.t_norm(t + attn_out)
        
        # Global pooling
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1))
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

        )

        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn_pool(text), dim=1)    # [B, 77, 1]

        t_pool = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)    # [B, 768]

        t = self.t_proj(t_pool)  # [B, hidden]

        v_gate = self.v_gate(concat)
        t_gate = self.t_gate(concat)

        t_enhanced = t_gate * t + (1 - t_gate) * self.v_to_t(v)
        
        # Fuse and classify

        return self.classifier(fused)

        # Cross-modal interaction
        v_cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_v(t))
        t_cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_t(v))
        
        v_enhanced = self.ln_v(v + v_cross)
        t_enhanced = self.ln_t(t + t_cross)
        
        # Gated fusion

        gate = self.gate(concat)

        )

        )

        self.v_fusion = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_fusion = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

        self.gate = nn.Sequential(

            nn.Sigmoid()
        )

            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),

        )

        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v * gate
        t_gated = t * gate
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, b], dim=-1)  # B x (hidden*3)
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

        # Gated fusion

        return self.classifier(fused)

        )

        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_t, h),
            nn.LayerNorm(h)
        )
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(h, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(h, 1)
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        self.v2t_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(h, num_heads=4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.t2v_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(h, num_heads=4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(h * 2, h),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(h * 2, h),
            nn.LayerNorm(h),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(h, 4)
        )
        
    def attn_pool(self, x, attn_layer):
        weights = attn_layer(x)
        weights = F.softmax(weights, dim=1)
        return (x * weights).sum(dim=1)

        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, h]
        t = self.t_proj(text)    # [B, 77, h]
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        v_attended, _ = self.v2t_attn(v, t, t)
        t_attended, _ = self.t2v_attn(t, v, v)
        
        # Attention pooling
        v_pool = self.attn_pool(v, self.v_attn)
        t_pool = self.attn_pool(t, self.t_attn)
        va_pool = self.attn_pool(v_attended, self.v_attn)
        ta_pool = self.attn_pool(t_attended, self.t_attn)
        
        # Feature gating
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1))
        
        # Gated fusion of original and attended features
        v_fused = gate * v_pool + (1 - gate) * va_pool
        t_fused = gate * t_pool + (1 - gate) * ta_pool
        
        # Classification
        return self.classifier(torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1))

        t = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Concatenate and classify
        fused = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)  # [B, 256]

    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling for sequence aggregation
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Feature projections to common dimension
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling: compute attention weights
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.v_attn(visual), dim=1)
        v_pooled = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn(text), dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v_pooled)
        t = self.t_proj(t_pooled)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        fused = gate * v + (1 - gate) * t
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(1024, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(768, 1)
        
        # Projections to common dimension
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(1024, hidden)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(768, hidden)
        
        # Layer normalization
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.cross_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden * 2, hidden),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )

            nn.Linear(hidden, 32),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),

        )

        # Attention-weighted pooling
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.v_attn(visual), dim=1)
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_attn(text), dim=1)
        
        v_pooled = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension with normalization
        v_h = self.v_ln(self.v_proj(v_pooled))
        t_h = self.t_ln(self.t_proj(t_pooled))
        
        # Cross-modal gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_h, t_h], dim=-1)
        gate = self.cross_gate(concat)
        fused = gate * v_h + (1 - gate) * t_h
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Modality encoders
        self.v_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.t_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion layer
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Encode modalities
        v = self.v_encoder(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        t = self.t_encoder(text)    # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Attention pooling
        v_w = F.softmax(self.v_attn(v), dim=1)
        t_w = F.softmax(self.t_attn(t), dim=1)
        v_pooled = (v * v_w).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        t_pooled = (t * t_w).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_v(t_pooled))
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_t(v_pooled))
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.fusion(concat)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return out

        )
        self.t_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.v_to_t_gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_to_v_gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 4)
        )

        t_attn_weights = F.softmax(self.t_pool_attn(text), dim=1)
        
        v_pooled = (visual * v_attn_weights).sum(dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_attn_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Encode modalities
        v_feat = self.v_encoder(v_pooled)
        t_feat = self.t_encoder(t_pooled)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.t_to_v_gate(t_feat))
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.v_to_t_gate(v_feat))
        
        v_gated = v_feat * v_gate
        t_gated = t_feat * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and classify
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal interaction
        self.cross_attn = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer normalization
        self.ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 3, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling
        visual_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(visual), dim=1)
        visual_pooled = (visual * visual_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        text_attn = F.softmax(self.text_attn(text), dim=1)
        text_pooled = (text * text_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        # Cross-modal interaction
        cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_attn(visual_proj) * text_proj)
        
        # Gating
        concat = torch.cat([visual_proj, text_proj], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        # Gated fusion
        gated = self.ln(gate * visual_proj + (1 - gate) * text_proj)
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([gated, cross, visual_proj * text_proj], dim=-1)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, 
            num_heads=4, 
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Layer normalization
        self.ln1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: (B, 256, 1024)
        # text: (B, 77, 768)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # (B, 256, 256)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, 256)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )  # (B, 256, 256)
        
        # Residual connection
        visual_enhanced = self.ln1(visual_feat + cross_out)
        
        # Pool features
        visual_pooled = visual_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 256)
        text_pooled = text_feat.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 256)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        fused = gate * visual_pooled + (1 - gate) * text_pooled
        
        # Layer norm and classify
        fused = self.ln2(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Extract dimensions - handle dict format from API contract
        visual_info = input_dims.get('visual', {})
        text_info = input_dims.get('text', {})
        
        if isinstance(visual_info, dict):
            self.visual_dim = visual_info.get('shape', [256, 1024])[-1]
        elif isinstance(visual_info, (list, tuple)):
            self.visual_dim = visual_info[-1]
        else:
            self.visual_dim = 1024
            
        if isinstance(text_info, dict):
            self.text_dim = text_info.get('shape', [77, 768])[-1]
        elif isinstance(text_info, (list, tuple)):
            self.text_dim = text_info[-1]
        else:
            self.text_dim = 768
        
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling for sequence aggregation
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, 1)
        
        # Projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Low-rank bilinear fusion
        self.bilinear_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64, bias=False)
        self.bilinear_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64, bias=False)
        self.bilinear_out = nn.Linear(64, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 3, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
    
    def attention_pool(self, x, attn_layer):
        # x: [B, Seq, Dim]
        scores = attn_layer(x).squeeze(-1)  # [B, Seq]
        weights = F.softmax(scores, dim=-1)  # [B, Seq]
        return (x * weights.unsqueeze(-1)).sum(dim=1)  # [B, Dim]
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling over sequence dimension
        v_pool = self.attention_pool(visual, self.v_attn)  # [B, 1024] -> [B, hidden]
        t_pool = self.attention_pool(text, self.t_attn)    # [B, 768] -> [B, hidden]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v_pool)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t = self.t_proj(t_pool)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate_v = self.gate_v(concat)
        gate_t = self.gate_t(concat)
        
        v_gated = gate_v * v
        t_gated = gate_t * t
        
        # Low-rank bilinear fusion
        v_bi = self.bilinear_v(v)
        t_bi = self.bilinear_t(t)
        bilinear = self.bilinear_out(v_bi * t_bi)
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, bilinear], dim=-1)
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        self.d_model = 256
        
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim * 2, self.d_model)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim * 2, self.d_model)
        
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(self.d_model)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(self.d_model)
        
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(self.d_model, self.d_model)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(self.d_model, self.d_model)
        
        self.bilinear = nn.Bilinear(self.d_model, self.d_model, 128)
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        v_mean = visual.mean(dim=1)
        v_max = visual.max(dim=1).values
        v = torch.cat([v_mean, v_max], dim=-1)
        
        t_mean = text.mean(dim=1)
        t_max = text.max(dim=1).values
        t = torch.cat([t_mean, t_max], dim=-1)
        
        v = self.v_proj(v)
        t = self.t_proj(t)
        
        v = self.v_ln(v)
        t = self.t_ln(t)
        
        v_gated = v * torch.sigmoid(self.gate_v(t))
        t_gated = t * torch.sigmoid(self.gate_t(v))
        
        fused = self.bilinear(v_gated, t_gated)
        
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Feature-wise gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim)
        
        # Low-rank bilinear fusion
        self.bilinear_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 64, bias=False)
        self.bilinear_t = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 64, bias=False)
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + 64, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Mean pooling over sequence dimension
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        text_pooled = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_feat = F.relu(self.visual_proj(visual_pooled))  # [B, 256]
        text_feat = F.relu(self.text_proj(text_pooled))  # [B, 256]
        
        # Gating fusion
        concat = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(concat))  # [B, 256]

        # Low-rank bilinear fusion
        bilinear = self.bilinear_v(visual_feat) * self.bilinear_t(text_feat)  # [B, 64]

        fused = torch.cat([gated, bilinear], dim=-1)  # [B, 320]
        
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
